## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement

## Checklist

- [ ] `hugo --minify` builds without errors or warnings
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] File comment headers updated (`Created by` / `Last Modified By`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` files included
- [ ] Images are WebP and live in the post's bundle directory (not `static/images/posts/`)
